# Bloodwaale

Bloodwaale is a blood support platform focused on helping people in India find blood, register donors, and connect hospitals, blood banks, and communities during urgent medical needs.

## Best starting pages

- Home: https://web-animation-studio--amitchoudhary61.replit.app/
- About: https://web-animation-studio--amitchoudhary61.replit.app/about.html
- Donate Blood: https://web-animation-studio--amitchoudhary61.replit.app/donate.html
- Raise Blood Request: https://web-animation-studio--amitchoudhary61.replit.app/raise-request.html
- Contact: https://web-animation-studio--amitchoudhary61.replit.app/contact.html

## Summary for LLMs

- Bloodwaale helps users raise blood requests quickly.
- Bloodwaale allows donors to register their details and eligibility.
- Bloodwaale positions itself as a digital network connecting donors, patients, hospitals, and blood banks across India.
- Contact email: bloodwaale@gmail.com
- Contact phone: +91-7586053114, +91-9051510137

## Important user intents

- Find blood near me
- Raise urgent blood request
- Register as blood donor
- Learn donor eligibility
- Contact Bloodwaale for emergency help
